Title: Stars at Noon
Writer: Denis Johnson, Claire Denis, Léa Mysius
Actors: Margaret Qualley, Joe Alwyn, Benny Safdie
Plot: Set during the Sandinista Revolution in Nicaragua in 1984, it tells the story of the encounter between a mysterious British businessman and an American journalist committed to following the developments of the revolution. The two, driven by a strong connection, will be the protagonists of a love story, remaining prey to a "dangerous labyrinth of lies and conspiracies", trying to escape the country.
